transcript: And after I dump this bucket of ice in my head, I get to nominate three new people to challenge. So I'm going to challenge Bill Gates, my partner in Facebook, Sheryl Sandberg, and Netflix's founder and CEO, Reed Hastings. I'm glad to give to ALS. It's a great cause, but I want to accept this challenge. I want to do it better than it's been done. Been working on this, you know, got this...
